text: have the credentials you need, contact them—Anthropic can't provide or reset them for you. Network allowlist The add-in needs to reach specific domains to function. Which domains depend on whether your organization uses the Anthropic API directly (1P) or a third-party platform (3P). Share the applicable table with your network or security team so they can allowlist these domains. Important: In all configurations—including third-party—your prompts and Claude's responses travel only to your chosen inference provider (your gateway, Bedrock, Vertex AI, or Azure AI Foundry). The domains listed below that point to Anthropic (such as pivot.claude.ai) serve the add-in's interface, feature configuration, and operational telemetry. They don't carry prompt or response content. Anthropic API (1P) Use this table if people in your organization sign in with a Claude account and inference goes to api.anthropic.com. Domain Domain Required when Required when Purpose Purpose pivot.claude.ai pivot.claude.ai Always Always Add-in host. Serves the task pane UI and proxies analytics, icon search, skill downloads, and telemetry. Add-in host. Serves the task pane UI and proxies analytics, icon search, skill downloads, and telemetry. claude.ai claude.ai Always Always Anthropic OAuth sign-in and feature-flag evaluation. Anthropic OAuth sign-in and feature-flag evaluation. api.anthropic.com api.anthropic.com Always Always Claude inference API, file uploads, code-execution containers, and the MCP connector registry. Claude inference API, file uploads, code-execution containers, and the MCP connector registry. appsforoffice.microsoft.com appsforoffice.microsoft.com Always Always Microsoft Office.js runtime script. Required by every Office add-in. Microsoft Office.js runtime script. Required by every Office add-in. o1158394.ingest.us.sentry.io o1158394.ingest.us.sentry.io Optional Optional Crash and error reporting. Blocking this degrades diagnostics only; the add-in still works. Crash and error reporting. WebSocket bridge for the work across apps feature. Third-party platforms (3P) Use this table if people in your organization sign in with Microsoft Entra ID and inference goes to your LLM gateway, Bedrock, or Vertex AI. Domain Domain Required when Required when Purpose Purpose pivot.claude.ai pivot.claude.ai Always Always Add-in host. Serves the task pane UI and proxies analytics, icon search, and telemetry.
